# aidbox_resource (Resource)

AidboxResource generic resource for any aidbox resource. Escape hatch for controlling resources not natively supported by this plugin

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aidbox_resource" "my_aidbox_job" {
  resource = jsonencode({
    id           = "my_aidbox_job"
    resourceType = "AidboxJob"
    type         = "periodic"
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `resource` (String) Aidbox resource content in JSON format

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
